relations: Bonsai tree cultivation originated in China
Bonsai tree cultivation was developed and refined in Japan
Miniaturization is a crucial aspect of bonsai tree cultivation, focusing on the tree's small size and sense of maturity
Shaping and styling are essential techniques in bonsai tree cultivation for achieving the desired form and balance
China influences bonsai cultivation with its naturalistic and informal styles, contributing to the diversity of the art form
Japan is known for its significant contribution to the elegant and refined styles of bonsai cultivation
Bonsai cultivation draws inspiration from nature, reflecting its beauty and essence in miniature trees
